series_metadata.series_description: Requests for outside agency (ex. Highway Patrol, Auditor, EOD...) to investigate an employee. Includes request, referral, and any attached documentation including preliminary investigation before the referral

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after complation of investigation or decision not to investigate, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after complation of investigation or decision not to investigate, then destroy, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
